title: Awareness
body:
In psychology and philosophy, awareness is the perception or knowledge of something. The concept is often synonymous with consciousness; however, one can be aware of something without being explicitly conscious of it (e.g., blindsight).
The states of awareness are also associated with the states of experience, so that the structure represented in awareness is mirrored in the structure of experience.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from May 2023
